description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:8.11.1 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs the exact commands: npm install, npm run build, and mv build/* public/. Cache the ./node_modules/ directory, publish the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and configure the job to run only on the master branch. The job should be named pages and belong to the deploy stage. This setup deploys the built static site to GitLab Pages.
